nodes.label: Madlanga Commission
nodes.subtitle: Commission of Inquiry into Criminality, Political Interference and Corruption in the Criminal Justice System

edges.explanation: Commission chaired by retired Justice Mbuyiseli Madlanga (widely reported).
Hearings commenced 17 Sep 2025, reporting and summaries available in news coverage.
Live coverage and reporting of testimony on 23 March 2026.

evidence.title: LIVE: Madlanga Commission of Inquiry | 23 March 2026
evidence.summary: SABC live coverage and reporting of the Madlanga Commission hearings and witness testimony (23 March 2026).

evidence.title: The Madlanga Commission’s first week: a brief summary
evidence.summary: Summary of the Commission's opening week, including testimony from Lt-Gen Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi and background on the Political Killings Task Team (PKTT).

evidence.title: Cross-examination of Fannie Nkosi continues at Madlanga inquiry
evidence.summary: TimesLIVE live reporting on the cross-examination of Sergeant Fannie Nkosi on 23 March 2026.

timeline.title: Public allegations by Lt-Gen Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi
timeline.summary: On 6 July 2025 Lt-Gen Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi publicly alleged corruption and political interference in the criminal justice system, triggering calls for inquiry.

timeline.title: Commission established
timeline.summary: President Cyril Ramaphosa established the Judicial Commission of Inquiry (Madlanga Commission) in response to the allegations.

timeline.title: Hearings commence
timeline.summary: Public hearings began on 17 September 2025 with Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi giving evidence in the opening week.

timeline.title: Fannie Nkosi testimony (latest)
timeline.summary: Live reporting and cross-examination of Sergeant Fannie Nkosi took place on 23 March 2026.
